title: Add inline outreach-status control and an overdue badge to the jobs table and pursuit panel
userStory: As the user, I want to set a posting's outreach status from the jobs table and pursuit panel and see an at-a-glance 'follow-up due' badge, so I can manage reply state where I already work.
acceptanceCriteria: The jobs table row exposes an inline outreach-status control (select or cycling button) with values none / awaiting / replied / no response; changing it PUTs to /api/postings/{id} and reflects the new value without a full reload.
The pursuit slide-in panel shows and edits the same outreach_status (in the Outreach or Pipeline section).
Rows that are overdue for follow-up (awaiting AND last_outreach_at older than the interval AND response empty) show a distinct 'follow-up due' badge.
The badge does NOT show for postings that are replied, no_response, never contacted, advanced (response set), or hidden/rejected.
Setting status to 'replied' or 'no_response' clears the due badge on that row immediately.

[UI changes] Verify in the browser: change status on a row, confirm it persists across reload; confirm the badge appears/disappears per the rules above. (Use the tsx build workaround per project memory; npm run build is broken in this sandbox.)
TypeScript compiles via the project's working build path; no console errors on the jobs view.
